description: Add configurable timeout and rate limiting to health_check probes
changes: Added TokenBucket rate limiter class with thread-safe acquire/stats/reset
Added --timeout CLI flag for per-probe timeout configuration
Added --probe-rate CLI flag for rate limiting (max probes/second)
Integrated rate limiter with circuit breaker: HALF_OPEN state reduces rate to 50%
Added rate limiter stats to health check aggregation report
Added 15 unit tests covering rate limiter logic, timeout handling, and half-open rate reduction
